projectSetup.title: Minecraft Modpack Builder
projectSetup.subtitle: Create a new modpack to get started
projectSetup.versionsUnavailable: Couldn't load the Minecraft version list.

modBrowser.noCurseForgeKey: No CurseForge API key configured — CurseForge results won't appear. Add one in Settings.

sourceError.invalid-api-key: CurseForge: invalid API key ({{status}}). Check Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hintPrefix: Get a Core API key at
settings.hintSuffix: . The key is stored encrypted on this machine and never enters the project files.
settings.keyStatusMissing: No API key configured — CurseForge search won't work
settings.keyValid: Saved and verified — the key is valid and working.
settings.keyInvalid: ⚠ Saved, but: CurseForge rejected the key ({{status}}). Make sure you used a Core API key, not a Studio personal access token.

launcher.title: Game Launcher
launcher.notDetected: Not detected automatically — browse for it below.
launcher.note: This opens the launcher app — it can't select your profile or press Play for you. Point your launcher's game directory at the exported folder once, then use the Launch button anytime to open it.

export.title: Export

folder.title: Mods Folder
folder.description: Downloads mods/resource packs/shaders into a mods/resourcepacks/shaderpacks folder structure — for TLauncher or the official launcher.

mrpack.title: .mrpack
mrpack.description: Modrinth modpack format — importable into Prism Launcher and other .mrpack-compatible launchers.

curseforge-zip.title: CurseForge zip
curseforge-zip.description: CurseForge modpack format (manifest.json + overrides) — importable into the CurseForge app.

export.nothingSelected: No mods, resource packs, or shaders selected.

warningReason.distribution-disabled: {{name}}: the author disabled direct distribution — install manually
